task: Extract all S3 bucket names from CloudFormation template output
solution_criteria: Regex should correctly match S3 bucket names (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, 3-63 characters) and not match invalid bucket names or other resource names

task: Parse an AWS IAM policy JSON and extract all allowed actions
solution_criteria: Function should handle nested Statement arrays, multiple Effect types, and return a deduplicated list of all actions granted with Effect=Allow

task: Generate a valid AWS Lambda environment variables JSON object with encrypted database credentials
solution_criteria: JSON should include properly formatted key-value pairs with valid environment variable names (alphanumeric and underscore only), reference to KMS encryption, and at least 3 database-related variables
